Turnkey Construction · Bangalore

We build your home. You live your life.

Turnkey home construction — plot to handover, design to keys. NRIs welcome.

+91 96637 73871 brixconstruction.blr@gmail.com

Three transparent per-sq-ft packages — fixed scope, grade-specified materials, one team from foundation to final keys.

Build Packages

Three ways to build your home

Every package is a complete turn-key rate covering design, civil, MEP, finishes and government liaison. Pick a specification level — the scope below is exactly what you get.

Rates are per sq.ft. on built-up area. Material specs are generalized and may vary with the floor plan. Structural extras, compound wall, lift and statutory fees are billed separately as noted in each scope.

Everything under one roof

One team, foundation to handover

No juggling contractors. Brix delivers every stage of your home in-house, on one transparent rate.

Why Brix

Built to be trusted

01

Transparent rates

One per-sq-ft price covering 11 scope areas, with brand- and grade-specified materials listed up front. You know what you pay for and what you get.

02

Turnkey, plot to keys

Design, structural engineering, civil, MEP, finishes, fixtures and government liaison — handled by a single accountable team.

03

NRIs welcome

Remote-friendly updates, detailed drawings and a documented scope so you can build in Bangalore from anywhere with confidence.
